template.name: lbmaster
template.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <databaseChangeLog xmlns="http://www.liquibase.org/xml/ns/dbchangelog" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.liquibase.org/xml/ns/dbchangelog http://www.liquibase.org/xml/ns/dbchangelog/dbchangelog-4.23.xsd">
<!-- PostgreSQL extensions (if needed) --> <include file="db/changelog/0000-enable-extensions.xml"/>
<!-- Schema migrations --> $END$
</databaseChangeLog>

template.name: lbcreatetable
template.value:
<changeSet id="$ID$-create-$TABLE$-table" author="$AUTHOR$"> <comment>Create $TABLE$ table$END$</comment>
<createTable tableName="$TABLE$"> <column name="id" type="UUID" defaultValueComputed="gen_random_uuid()"> <constraints primaryKey="true" primaryKeyName="pk_$TABLE$"/> </column> <column name="tenant_id" type="VARCHAR(100)"> <constraints nullable="false"/> </column> <column name="created_at" type="TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE" defaultValueComputed="CURRENT_TIMESTAMP"> <constraints nullable="false"/> </column> <column name="updated_at" type="TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE"/> </createTable>
<createIndex indexName="idx_$TABLE$_tenant_id" tableName="$TABLE$"> <column name="tenant_id"/> </createIndex>
<rollback> <dropTable tableName="$TABLE$"/> </rollback> </changeSet>

template.name: lbaddcolumn
template.value:
<changeSet id="$ID$-add-$COLUMN$-to-$TABLE$" author="$AUTHOR$"> <comment>Add $COLUMN$ column to $TABLE$ table$END$</comment>
<addColumn tableName="$TABLE$"> <column name="$COLUMN$" type="$TYPE$"> <constraints nullable="$NULLABLE$"/> </column> </addColumn>
<rollback> <dropColumn tableName="$TABLE$" columnName="$COLUMN$"/> </rollback> </changeSet>

template.name: lbindex
template.value:
<changeSet id="$ID$-create-index-$INDEX$" author="$AUTHOR$"> <comment>Create index on $TABLE$($COLUMNS$)$END$</comment>
<createIndex indexName="$INDEX$" tableName="$TABLE$"> <column name="$COLUMNS$"/> </createIndex>
<rollback> <dropIndex indexName="$INDEX$" tableName="$TABLE$"/> </rollback> </changeSet>

template.name: lbfk
template.value:
<changeSet id="$ID$-add-fk-$CONSTRAINT$" author="$AUTHOR$"> <comment>Add foreign key from $BASE_TABLE$ to $REF_TABLE$$END$</comment>
<addForeignKeyConstraint constraintName="$CONSTRAINT$" baseTableName="$BASE_TABLE$" baseColumnNames="$BASE_COLUMN$" referencedTableName="$REF_TABLE$" referencedColumnNames="$REF_COLUMN$" onDelete="$DELETE_ACTION$"/>
<rollback> <dropForeignKeyConstraint baseTableName="$BASE_TABLE$" constraintName="$CONSTRAINT$"/> </rollback> </changeSet>

template.name: lbmodifytype
template.value:
<changeSet id="$ID$-modify-$COLUMN$-type" author="$AUTHOR$"> <comment>Change $TABLE$.$COLUMN$ type to $NEW_TYPE$$END$</comment>
<modifyDataType tableName="$TABLE$" columnName="$COLUMN$" newDataType="$NEW_TYPE$"/>
<rollback> <modifyDataType tableName="$TABLE$" columnName="$COLUMN$" newDataType="$OLD_TYPE$"/> </rollback> </changeSet>

template.name: lbextensions
template.value:
<changeSet id="0000-enable-extensions" author="$SERVICE$"> <comment>Enable PostgreSQL extensions for full-text search$END$</comment>
<sql>CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS pg_trgm;</sql>
<rollback> <sql>DROP EXTENSION IF EXISTS pg_trgm;</sql> </rollback> </changeSet>

template.name: lbnotnull
template.value:
<changeSet id="$ID$-add-not-null-$COLUMN$" author="$AUTHOR$"> <comment>Add NOT NULL constraint to $TABLE$.$COLUMN$$END$</comment>
<!-- Set default value for existing NULL rows --> <update tableName="$TABLE$"> <column name="$COLUMN$" value="$DEFAULT_VALUE$"/> <where>$COLUMN$ IS NULL</where> </update>
<addNotNullConstraint tableName="$TABLE$" columnName="$COLUMN$" columnDataType="$TYPE$"/>
<rollback> <dropNotNullConstraint tableName="$TABLE$" columnName="$COLUMN$"/> </rollback> </changeSet>

template.name: lbrename
template.value:
<changeSet id="$ID$-rename-$OLD$-to-$NEW$" author="$AUTHOR$"> <comment>Rename column $OLD$ to $NEW$ in $TABLE$$END$</comment>
<renameColumn tableName="$TABLE$" oldColumnName="$OLD$" newColumnName="$NEW$" columnDataType="$TYPE$"/>
<rollback> <renameColumn tableName="$TABLE$" oldColumnName="$NEW$" newColumnName="$OLD$" columnDataType="$TYPE$"/> </rollback> </changeSet>
